structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Zone Control Logic with Dual Inlet Airflow Sensors
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Temperature and Damper Control with Dual Inlet Airflow Sensors
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with dual inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, cooling-loop output resets active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum to cooling maximum; cold duct damper modulates to maintain setpoint; hot duct damper closed. When Zone State is deadband, active cold and hot duct airflow setpoints are their last setpoints before entering deadband. When Zone State is heating, heating-loop output resets active hot duct airflow setpoint from minimum to heating maximum; hot duct damper modulates to maintain setpoint; cold duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State changes to cooling, deadband, or heating.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling: cold duct airflow setpoint reset from minimum to cooling maximum, cold damper modulates, hot damper closed. Deadband: setpoints held at last values (minimum for the duct that was active, zero for the other). Heating: hot duct airflow setpoint reset from minimum to heating maximum, hot damper modulates, cold damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cooling airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed. ... b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct and hot duct airflow setpoints shall be their last setpoints just before entering deadband. ... c. When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured heating airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. The cold duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: a. When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cooling airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed. ... b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct and hot duct airflow setpoints shall be their last setpoints just before entering deadband. ... c. When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured heating airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. The cold duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Zone Control Logic with Single Discharge Airflow Sensor
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Temperature and Damper Control with a Single Discharge Airflow Sensor
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with single discharge airflow sensor
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, cooling-loop output resets active discharge airflow setpoint from minimum to cooling maximum; cold duct damper modulates to maintain setpoint; hot duct damper closed. When Zone State is deadband, active discharge airflow setpoint is minimum endpoint, maintained by the damper that was operative just before entering deadband; other damper closed. When Zone State is heating, heating-loop output resets active discharge airflow setpoint from minimum to heating maximum; hot duct damper modulates to maintain setpoint; cooling damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State changes to cooling, deadband, or heating.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling: discharge airflow setpoint reset from minimum to cooling maximum, cold damper modulates, hot damper closed. Deadband: discharge setpoint at minimum, maintained by previously active damper (cold if from cooling, hot if from heating), other damper closed. Heating: discharge airflow setpoint reset from minimum to heating maximum, hot damper modulates, cooling damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall reset the active discharge airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured discharge airflow at active discharge airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed. ... b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active discharge airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint, maintained by the damper that was operative just before entering deadband. The other damper shall remain closed. ... c. When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output shall reset the active discharge airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured discharge airflow at the active discharge airflow setpoint. The cooling damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: a. When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall reset the active discharge airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured discharge airflow at active discharge airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed. ... b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active discharge airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint, maintained by the damper that was operative just before entering deadband. The other damper shall remain closed. ... c. When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output shall reset the active discharge airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured discharge airflow at the active discharge airflow setpoint. The cooling damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cold-Deck Supply Air Temperature Override for Cooling Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Temperature and Damper Control with Dual Inlet Airflow Sensors
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with dual inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If cold-deck supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling and cold-deck supply air temperature > room temperature.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Limit active cold duct airflow setpoint to no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. If cold-deck supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: 1. If cold-deck supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hot-Deck Supply Air Temperature Override for Heating Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Temperature and Damper Control with Dual Inlet Airflow Sensors
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with dual inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If hot-deck supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the active hot duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating and hot-deck supply air temperature < room temperature.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Limit active hot duct airflow setpoint to no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. If hot-deck supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the active hot duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: 1. If hot-deck supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the active hot duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Overriding Logic to Avoid Backflow
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Overriding Sections 5.11.5.1 and 5.11.5.2 Logic (to Avoid Backflow from One Duct to the Other)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating or cooling air handler not proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Close the corresponding damper (heating damper if heating air handler not proven ON; cooling damper if cooling air handler not proven ON).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed. b. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: a. If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed. b. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0, generate Level 4 alarm. If less than 50% for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0, generate Level 3 alarm. Alarms suppressed for zones with Importance-Multiplier of 0.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes (Level 4) or < 50% for 10 minutes (Level 3) while setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 or Level 3 alarm as appropriate. Suppress if zone Importance-Multiplier = 0.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow below threshold for specified duration.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm. b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm. c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm. b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm. c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan off and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of max airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading above threshold while fan is off.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position is 0% and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling max airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Dual-Duct VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, or Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches interlocked to a system level point for the listed overrides.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify that software switches exist to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests from Dual-Duct VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes, send 3 requests. Else if exceeds by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes, send 2 requests. Else if Cooling Loop > 95%, send 1 request until loop < 85%. Else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature relative to cooling setpoint and Cooling Loop output.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3, 2, 1, or 0 requests as per the hierarchy.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cold-Duct Static Pressure Reset Requests from Dual-Duct VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow < 50% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper position > 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. Else if < 70% of setpoint while setpoint > 0 and damper > 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. Else if damper > 95%, send 1 request until damper < 85%. Else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow relative to setpoint and damper position.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3, 2, 1, or 0 requests as per the hierarchy.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%. d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests. b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint while setpoint is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests. c. Else if the damper position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the damper position is less than 85%. d. Else if the damper position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Active endpoints used in the control logic
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints vary by Zone Group mode: Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. Cooling maximum is Vcool-max in Occupied/Cooldown/Setup, 0 in Warmup/Setback/Unoccupied. Minimum is Vmin in Occupied, 0 otherwise. Heating maximum is Vheat-max in Occupied/Warmup/Setback, 0 otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active endpoints according to Table 5.11.4.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Table 5.11.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode: Endpoint | Occupied | Cooldown | Setup | Warmup | Setback | Unoccupied; Cooling maximum | Vcool-max | Vcool-max | Vcool-max | 0 | 0 | 0; Minimum | Vmin* | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0; Heating maximum | Vheat-max | 0 | 0 | Vheat-max | Vheat-max | 0

evidence_quote: Table 5.11.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode: Endpoint | Occupied | Cooldown | Setup | Warmup | Setback | Unoccupied; Cooling maximum | Vcool-max | Vcool-max | Vcool-max | 0 | 0 | 0; Minimum | Vmin* | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0; Heating maximum | Vheat-max | 0 | 0 | Vheat-max | Vheat-max | 0
